sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:00:00');
SELECT event_id, time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 day', event_time) AS bucketed_time FROM events;
UPDATE events SET event_time = time_bucket(INTERVAL '2 weeks', event_time) WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time, time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 hour', event_time, TIMESTAMP '2000-01-03 00:00:00') AS aligned_bucket FROM events;
